46: Chaotic alliance raids pit up to twenty-four adventurers against a fearsome foe who has been made even more powerful than before.

47: Do you wish to unlock the Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic)?

48: Ah, that reminds me. Some days ago, I had the pleasure of meeting your good friend G'raha Tia.

49: He approached me, wondering if he had seen me elsewhere before, and so I told him about my endeavors in verse.

50: Taking an interest in my work, he invited me to join him at Xbalyav Ty'e, where we discussed tales of heroism over tacos and churrasco.

51: 'Twas then that he shared a story that is especially close to his heart.

52: The fellowship of NOAH's foray into the Crystal Tower... You played a vital role in it, did you not?

53: Together with more than a score of your fellows, you triumphed over numerous formidable foes to secure the structure.

54: How do you recall the experience, pray? As adventurers typically work in small groups, I daresay it felt quite different to be part of a large contingent.

57: I may have been a little nervous...

58: I just played it by ear.

59: Haha, you truly are fearless, my friend!

60: Truly? I would not have expected that!

61: Hehe, I do favor such an approach myself.

62: Now, I can only speak as an observer, but I imagine it must be uniquely satisfying to sally forth as a member of a great collective to accomplish tremendous feats.

63: And to defeat the dreaded Cloud of Darkness is a tremendous feat indeed.

64: She is a ruler among her kind, occupying the highest rung of the hierarchy of voidsent.

65: Full oft has she left her mark upon mankind's history, not least of all when she forged a pact with Emperor Xande.

66: And according to records, she employed powerful magicks the likes of which defied mortal comprehension.

69: Didn't she use beams and...more beams?

70: Hmm... It may well be that you saw merely one aspect of the Cloud of Darkness.

71: As I understand it, voidsent are changeable beings, their forms dependent on factors such as the aether at their disposal. Another time, and you may have faced a somewhat different foe.

72: 'Tis an intriguing possibility to consider, would you not agree?

73: ...So together with your comrade Ryne, you gave rise to a being based upon the Cloud of Darkness?

74: A familiar yet distinct entity shaped by your combined impressions of the voidsent queen...

75: That gives me an idea! I shall compose a song about the <Emphasis>true</Emphasis> Cloud of Darkness as I imagine her, for which I shall draw inspiration from your account!

76: 'Tis an intriguing possibility to consider...and it gives me an idea!

77: I shall compose a song about the <Emphasis>true</Emphasis> Cloud of Darkness as I imagine her, for which I shall draw inspiration from your account!

79:
When Light and Dark as one become,
to oblivion all to cast,♪
A champion dauntless shall arise,
to cleave them at the last.♪

80:
Into their hands entrusted be,
the hopes of all mankind,♪
Upon the wind eternal borne,
a bright and shining sign.♪

81:
The time is come, so go you forth,
unto the battlefield.♪
The final confrontation looms,
To test your blade and shield.♪

82: Though it may pale in comparison to facing the Cloud of Darkness, it gave me great satisfaction to compose these verses. And should they give you satisfaction as well, then naught would please me more!
